assertion_results.text: Impact map or task descriptions explicitly flag at least 3 ambiguities from the feature description
assertion_results.evidence: The impact map (impact-map.md) explicitly flags 5 ambiguities under '## Ambiguities and Assumptions': (1) 'Search should be faster' — No performance baseline or target, (2) 'Results should be more relevant' — No definition of relevance, (3) 'Add filters — some kind of filtering capability' — Filter criteria unspecified, (4) 'Better UI' — Excluded from scope, (5) Non-functional requirements lack specificity. Each ambiguity includes specific unanswered questions and a labeled assumption.

assertion_results.text: Plan acknowledges that 'Better UI' (non-MVP) cannot be planned without design mockups or frontend repository and excludes it from scope
assertion_results.evidence: Impact map Ambiguity 4 states: 'The "Better UI" requirement is marked as non-MVP and cannot be planned without: Design mockups or Figma specifications, A frontend repository (only `trustify-backend` is in the repository registry). Decision: "Better UI" is excluded from this implementation plan. It should be planned separately once design assets and a frontend repository are available.' No task descriptions address Better UI.

assertion_results.text: Tasks still follow the task-description-template.md format despite ambiguous requirements
assertion_results.evidence: All 4 task files contain the required template sections: ## Repository (single repo name), ## Target Branch, ## Description, ## Files to Modify/Create (as applicable), ## Implementation Notes, ## Acceptance Criteria (checkbox format), ## Test Requirements (checkbox format), ## Verification Commands, and optional sections (## API Changes in tasks 2-3, ## Reuse Candidates in all tasks, ## Dependencies in tasks 2-4). This matches the task-description-template.md structure exactly.

assertion_results.text: Tasks document assumptions where they fill in missing details, labeled as assumptions pending clarification
assertion_results.evidence: Task 1 Description: 'Ambiguity note: The exact fields to include in each tsvector column are assumed based on the entity structures discovered in the repository. This assumption is pending clarification from the product owner'. Task 2 Description: 'Ambiguity note: "Relevance" is not defined in the feature description. This task assumes relevance means PostgreSQL ts_rank scoring... this assumption is pending clarification.' Task 3 Description: 'Ambiguity note: The feature description does not specify which fields should be filterable... This assumption is pending clarification from the product owner.' Impact map has 5 assumptions all explicitly labeled 'Assumption (pending clarification)'.

assertion_results.text: Every generated task description contains a Repository section with a single repository name (not multiple repos per task)
assertion_results.evidence: All 4 tasks contain '## Repository' followed by a single repository name 'trustify-backend': task-1 line 1-2, task-2 line 1-2, task-3 line 1-2, task-4 line 1-2. No task lists multiple repositories.

assertion_results.text: Every generated task description contains Description, Acceptance Criteria, and Test Requirements sections as required by the handoff contract in task-description-template.md
assertion_results.evidence: All 4 tasks contain all three required sections: task-1 has ## Description (line 7), ## Acceptance Criteria (line 35, 8 items), ## Test Requirements (line 44, 4 items); task-2 has ## Description (line 7), ## Acceptance Criteria (line 42, 7 items), ## Test Requirements (line 51, 5 items); task-3 has ## Description (line 7), ## Acceptance Criteria (line 42, 8 items), ## Test Requirements (line 52, 6 items); task-4 has ## Description (line 7), ## Acceptance Criteria (line 30, 8 items), ## Test Requirements (line 40, 10 items).

assertion_results.text: File paths in Files to Modify and Files to Create reference paths from the repo-backend.md mock repository structure manifest, not invented paths
assertion_results.evidence: All 'Files to Modify' entries reference paths present in repo-backend.md: migration/src/lib.rs (line 17), modules/search/src/service/mod.rs (line 91), common/src/db/query.rs (line 27), modules/search/src/endpoints/mod.rs (line 93), tests/api/search.rs (line 113). 'Files to Create' entries are new files placed in existing directories following established patterns: migration/src/m0002_full_text_search/mod.rs follows m0001_initial pattern (line 19-20), common/src/db/full_text.rs in existing common/src/db/ directory (line 26-27), modules/search/src/model/mod.rs follows the model/service/endpoints module pattern used throughout modules/fundamental/. No invented or nonexistent directory paths.

assertion_results.text: Implementation Notes in every task reference specific file paths and code patterns from the repository, not abstract or generic guidance
assertion_results.evidence: Task 1 Implementation Notes reference: migration/src/m0001_initial/mod.rs, entity/src/sbom.rs, entity/src/advisory.rs, entity/src/package.rs, modules/fundamental/src/advisory/model/summary.rs (severity field), modules/fundamental/src/package/model/summary.rs (license field), SeaORM migration runner. Task 2 references: modules/search/src/service/mod.rs, common/src/db/mod.rs, common/src/error.rs (AppError enum), common/src/model/paginated.rs (PaginatedResults<T>), modules/fundamental/ (module pattern), modules/search/src/endpoints/mod.rs (GET /api/v2/search), tower-http caching middleware. Task 3 references: modules/search/src/endpoints/mod.rs, modules/fundamental/ module pattern, modules/fundamental/src/advisory/model/summary.rs (severity field), common/src/db/query.rs, common/src/model/paginated.rs, Axum Query<T> extractor. Task 4 references: tests/api/search.rs, tests/api/sbom.rs, tests/api/advisory.rs, assert_eq!(resp.status(), StatusCode::OK) pattern, common/src/model/paginated.rs, modules/search/src/endpoints/mod.rs.
